title: Tomorrow's Leaders Today Donation
description: Equipped the Tomorrow's Leaders Today program with kits to inspire the next generation of innovators.

title: Scottish Rite Donation
description: Provided robotics kits to Scottish Rite Hospital to support educational and therapeutic play.

title: Children's Health Donation
description: Donated robotics kits to Children's Health to bring engaging STEM activities to young patients.

title: Kadak New Years Event
description: Celebrated the new year by sharing robotics activities and kits with families at the Kadak community event.

title: STEM Kit Drive
description: A community-wide drive collecting and distributing STEM kits to students in underserved areas.

title: Robotics Petting Zoo
description: Hands-on robotics showcase where attendees explored and interacted with a variety of robots and STEM kits.

title: Rubber Band Helicopter Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop to build rubber-band powered helicopters inspired by STEM Invention.
